modals.completionDescription: You've mastered this session. Ready for what's next?

home.tagline: Practice listening, speaking, and vocabulary in one system.
home.description: Fluenrin helps learners practice through listening lessons, shadowing, dictation, and vocabulary with SRS scheduled review.
home.scienceTitle: Learn more consistently with progress tracking and guided review
home.scienceDesc1: Learning becomes easier to maintain when you know what skill you are practicing, how far you have progressed, and what to continue next.
home.scienceDesc2: Fluenrin organizes learning into clear activities such as listening, repeating, typing, and reviewing vocabulary.
home.scienceDesc3: Vocabulary is not reviewed randomly. Words only return to review sessions when they are due, based on the memory rating you selected — this is the SRS (Spaced Repetition System) approach.
home.scienceQuote: Learn a manageable amount, practice with feedback, and review at the right time.
home.featuresSubtitle: Focused activities for daily English practice.
home.featureShadowingDesc: Listen and repeat sentence by sentence to improve speaking rhythm, pronunciation, and listening reflexes.
home.featureDictationDesc: Listen and type what you hear to improve accuracy, spelling, and sound recognition.
home.featureVocabularyDesc: Learn words by topic, practice with different modes, rate your memory, and review words when they are due — powered by SRS (Spaced Repetition System).
home.ctaTitle: Ready for your next learning session?
home.ctaDesc: Choose a suitable lesson or continue from your current progress.

header.reviewHubDesc: Review your saved words and sentences.
header.mockTestDesc: Take a full CEFR standard test.
header.discussionsDesc: Ask questions and share study tips.

footer.aboutDesc: Fluenrin is your personal AI Language Coach — engineered to help you master English through active immersion, precise shadowing, and smart dictation practice.
